revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Category:Pages with blank templates" to "Category:Erroneous transclusions of {{subst:PAGENAME}}"
revision.text: [[Category:Erroneous transclusions of TOC left]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Blank templates
revision.text:
[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of TOC left]] <noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Erroneous transclusions of TOC left
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>
</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]
